# Travellex

Travellex is an Africa-focused tour marketplace at https://travellex.tours.

Core search intent:
- Africa tours from Germany and Europe
- Tanzania safari tours
- Zanzibar tours and beach holidays
- Kilimanjaro tours
- Ngorongoro Crater safari tours
- Stone Town, Nungwi, Kendwa, Paje, Jozani Forest and Mnemba Island tours

Important pages:
- https://travellex.tours/
- https://travellex.tours/tours
- https://travellex.tours/destinations/germany-to-africa-tours
- https://travellex.tours/destinations/tanzania-tours
- https://travellex.tours/destinations/zanzibar-tours
- https://travellex.tours/destinations/tanzania-safari-tours
- https://travellex.tours/destinations/africa-safari-tours
- https://travellex.tours/gallery
- https://travellex.tours/contact

Travellex helps travellers compare approved local operators, EUR pricing, route details, images, videos and booking paths before continuing to the selected operator.
